description: User-configurable options for the rforge plugin. Override per-project in .claude/rforge.local.json.

cran_mirror.description: Default CRAN mirror used for install.packages() and dependency resolution. The R-project cloud CDN is vendor-neutral and globally distributed.

vignette_engine.description: Default VignetteBuilder used when scaffolding new vignettes. Set to 'quarto' to use Quarto-based vignettes instead.

r_version_pin.description: Default R version requirement written into DESCRIPTION's Depends field for new packages. Use SemVer comparison syntax.

claude_md_budget.description: Maximum line count for CLAUDE.md files; warned by /rforge:doc-check when exceeded.
